translation.chat_greeting: Hello! How can I help you?
translation.quote_kostenko: "Language is more than words. It is our way of being." — Lina Kostenko
translation.quote_symonenko: "Don't be afraid to be yourself, because others are busy being themselves." — Vasyl Symonenko
translation.quote_stus: "Happiness is when you are understood." — Vasyl Stus
translation.quote_ukrainka: "Those who do not live for others do not live for themselves." — Lesya Ukrainka
translation.quote_franko: "A person without a dream is like a bird without wings." — Ivan Franko
translation.about_title: A place where every voice matters
translation.about_p1: The idea for this site emerged when I came across English-language articles where authors shared their experiences, observations and research.
translation.about_p2: These materials, written by teachers, students and education professionals, inspired me to create a platform for publishing educational materials, poetry and literary works.
translation.about_highlight: We strive to create a space where everyone can find inspiration and knowledge.
translation.works_desc: On our platform you can find a variety of educational articles, poetry and literary works written by both professionals and beginners.
translation.works_sub: We invite you to share your works and ideas to build a community that supports creativity and learning.
translation.membership_desc: Get unlimited access to quality content.
translation.membership_already: You are already a member of the community!
translation.popular_subtitle: Hover over the envelope — open the letter
translation.review1_text: "Word" is a wonderful platform for teachers and students.
translation.review2_text: I received many positive reviews for my works.
translation.review3_text: "Word" inspired me to pursue my own creative experiments.
translation.newsletter_desc: New articles, works and educational materials — straight to your inbox.
translation.newsletter_success: Thank you! You have successfully subscribed.
translation.reg_terms: By clicking "Register", you agree to the Terms of Use.
translation.emailreg_password_weak: Password must contain at least 8 characters, uppercase and lowercase letters and numbers
translation.emailreg_email_invalid: Please enter a valid email address
translation.reset_placeholder: Enter your email for password recovery
